subcodes.first_line: O thou upon whom the chains and fetters have weighed so heavily in the path of God! Jinab-i-Amín is present [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من اثقل علیه الوطا السلاسل و الاغلال فی سبیل الله جناب امین حاضراند و
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @praise and encouragement, @rejection, opposition and persecution
